title: Near-infrared fluorescence imaging of mammalian cells and xenograft tumors with SNAP-tag.
author: Gong H Kovar JL Baker B Zhang A Cheung L Draney DR Correa IR Xu MQ Olive DM
content: S-EPMC3316518 PMC3316518 Near-infrared fluorescence imaging of mammalian cells and xenograft tumors with SNAP-tag. Fluorescence in the near-infrared (NIR) spectral region is suitable for in vivo imaging due to its reduced background and high penetration capability compared to visible fluorescence
